name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BUG-26
title: dispatch-tdd-subagent.py exit codes for find-feature failure inconsistent with spec contract
description: When --scope <feature> cannot be resolved by find-feature.py (lines 172-175), dispatch-tdd-subagent.py exits 1. But the contract declares exit codes as '0=success, 2=bad invocation (missing feature-name or request-description)' — no exit 1 is defined. Either add '1=feature not found' to contract.md, or change the exit to 2 (bad invocation). Same applies to --linked-item without --item-type which exits 2 (matches contract). Document and align consistently.
